flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dallas College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $2.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dallas College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $6.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dallas College fell 11% between 2022 and 2024 (75.0% → 66.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dallas College rose 70% between 2021 and 2024 (19.1% → 32.3%).
